data.body:
cartine@adrian:~$ foolery doctor
node:fs:440
    return binding.readFileUtf8(path, stringToFlags(options.flag));
                   ^

Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open /proc/1135470/fd/pipe:[77157002]
    at Object.readFileSync (node:fs:440:20)
    at defaultLoadImpl (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1148:17)
    at loadSource (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1838:20)
    at Object..js (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1936:44)
    at Module.load (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1533:32)
    at Module._load (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1335:12)
    at wrapModuleLoad (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:255:19)
    at Module.executeUserEntryPoint [as runMain] (node:internal/modules/run_main:154:5)
    at node:internal/main/run_main_module:33:47 {
  errno: -2,
  code: ENOENT,
  syscall: open,
  path: /proc/1135470/fd/pipe:[77157002]
}
data.title: foolery doctor fails ENOENT on linux
